title: Symphyochaeta macrocephala
taxonomy: Symphyochaeta macrocephala is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Symphyochaeta and the subfamily Chloridoideae. The family Poaceae is commonly known as the grass family. Within the family Poaceae, Symphyochaeta macrocephala is a unique species with distinct characteristics. The classification of Symphyochaeta macrocephala is further supported by its morphological and anatomical features.
